The image depicts a battle scene with warriors. They are wearing helmets, some form of chest armor, carrying round shields, and appear to be engaged in close combat. There are no obvious anachronisms like modern clothing, technology, or fantastical elements. 

However, the specific armor types are a bit ambiguous and could be potentially inaccurate depending on the level of detail required. Also the way the armor is made in this image is not quite how hunnic armor were. Hunnic armies mostly relied on composite bows. Hunnic armor usually consisted of lamellar armor, scale armor, or brigandine, made of iron or bronze plates or scales sewn onto a leather or fabric backing.
